name: lever-example
description: Lever URL routes to tier-2 adapter against api.lever.co.

json.descriptionPlain: AcmeCorp is building the next generation of developer-productivity tooling. We are looking for a Staff Product Engineer to drive our core editor experience from 0 to 1 and shape the direction of our platform.

lists.content:
• Lead design and implementation of core editor features
  • Partner with design and product to ship iteratively
  • Mentor senior and mid-level engineers
  • Own the user-facing reliability story end to end

• 8+ years of production TypeScript or similar
  • Track record shipping consumer-quality developer tools
  • Opinionated taste for performance and UX polish

json.additional: We offer competitive compensation, equity, and full benefits. AcmeCorp is a remote-first company headquartered in San Francisco.
